sentences.translation: Karim je zaboravio torbu u autobusu.
sentences.translationEn: Karim forgot his bag on the bus.

sentences.translation: Otišao je u ured izgubljenih predmeta.
sentences.translationEn: He went to the lost and found office.

sentences.translation: Službenik je pronašao torbu i vratio mu je.
sentences.translationEn: The employee found the bag and returned it to him.

sentences.translation: Karim se obradovao i puno zahvalio službeniku.
sentences.translationEn: Karim was happy and thanked the employee a lot.
